title: Ledger Certificate
description: Schema for a hc-grc acceptance/rejection certificate issued by a Tier-2 adversary (or self-attested by Tier-0 for adversary-less stages). The stem of the certificate filename is the certificate_id; artifact.certificate_ref must equal that stem. stage_gate.py loads this file via ledger/certificates/<certificate_ref>.json and requires verdict == ACCEPT.

certificate_id.description: Unique certificate identifier. Must equal the filename stem of this file under ledger/certificates/. This is the value artifact.certificate_ref points to.

artifact_id.description: The artifact_id of the artifact this certificate covers. Must match the artifact_id field in the corresponding registry entry.

stage_id.description: Stage the certified artifact belongs to.

producer.description: The agent and model that produced the artifact being certified.

adversary_block.description: Either a normal adversary review block (for stages with required_adversary_disciplines non-empty) or a self-attestation block (for P0 and any future stages with required_adversary_disciplines: []). Exactly one of these two forms must be present.

oneOf.title: Normal adversary review
oneOf.description: Used for all stages with at least one required adversary discipline (P1, S1f, S3, S4-S9, X1-X5). The adversary is a same-discipline Tier-2 agent running a different model from the producer.

model.description: Model used by the adversary. Should differ from the producer's model for Layer-3 weight independence. If identical, a limitation must be noted in residual_limitations.

stance.description: Rotating review stance applied (e.g. falsification-probe, competing-hypotheses, completeness-audit, red-team, premortem). Must differ from the stance used on any prior revision of this artifact.

rounds.description: Number of review rounds completed (including revisions). 1 means ACCEPT on first submission.

oneOf.title: Self-attestation (adversary-less stage)
oneOf.description: Used for P0 (required_adversary_disciplines: []) and any future orchestration-only stages. The coordinator or Tier-0 agent attests that the artifact meets the stage's DoD. No same-discipline adversary review is performed; this is by gate design, not an exception. Must carry self_attested: true.

self_attested.description: Must be true. Signals this certificate bypasses same-discipline adversary review per gate design.

attesting_agent.description: The Tier-0 agent performing the attestation (e.g. multi-agent-coordinator, context-manager).

verdict.description: Final verdict. stage_gate.py requires ACCEPT for the stage to pass. REJECT certificates should be stored in ledger/defects/ instead of ledger/certificates/ — a certificate in ledger/certificates/ with verdict REJECT will cause the stage gate to fail.

completeness_verdict.description: Adversary's assessment of whether the artifact covers all required elements of its Definition of Done.

quality_verdict.description: Adversary's assessment of whether the artifact meets the quality bar for the stage (correctness, rigor, reproducibility as applicable).

residual_limitations.description: Acknowledged limitations that survive acceptance. Required per AGENT_SYSTEM.md atomic operation. For finding artifacts, must include the model independence note (Anthropic sonnet/opus tier-level diversity). Empty array is valid only for orchestration artifacts with no material limitations.

model_independence_note.description: Explicit statement of model independence status per AGENT_SYSTEM.md section 'Model independence: honest accounting'. For standard adversary reviews: state that tier-level diversity only is provided (Anthropic sonnet/opus). For self-attestation: state 'orchestration artifact; no same-discipline adversary per P0 gate design'.

git_commit.description: Full SHA-1 git commit hash of the artifact at certification time. Must match artifact.git_commit.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this certificate was issued.

defect_refs.description: References to defect records (stems under ledger/defects/) issued during prior rejection rounds for this artifact. Empty for first-round accepts.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes from the adversary or attesting agent.
